signal scalp #9
🗓 26th, feb 2026

🔴 sell xauusd 5172 - 5174
⚠️ sl: 5180
💰 tp1: 5167 (50 - 70 pips)
💰 tp2: 5162 (100 - 120 pips)
💰 tp3: 5152 (200 - 220 pips)
💰 tp4: 5132 (400 - 420 pips)

analysis corner
🔺the 5172 - 5174 zone is currently acting as a newly formed support area after price broke the short-term bearish structure and created a higher high.
🔺this is the first pullback zone since the breakout, while also aligning closely with the ema34 on the m15 timeframe. if price retraces and holds above this area, there is a high probability that a new higher low will form, confirming the continuation of the short-term uptrend.
note: entry can be placed around 5172.xx for a better entry point
